metadata.description: Authoritative setup and prompting guides for image generation models

plugins.name: image-model-skills
plugins.description: Authoritative ComfyUI, diffusers, and API guides for FLUX.2, Ideogram 4, Z-Image, SDXL, and Krea 2 — covering setup, prompting, ControlNet, face identity, character consistency, LoRA training, multi-stage and mixed-model production pipelines, and failure modes
